title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Leela Palaces

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Leela Palaces
jsonLd.description:
We at Leela Palaces are looking for an experienced Hotel Manager based out of Surat. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Leela Palaces:
Leela Palaces is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Crisis Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Leela Palaces!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
